headline: GE Vernova Backlog Surges As AI And Grid Demand Reshape Outlook
summary: GE Vernova (NYSE:GEV) is reporting record order backlog growth, with demand from AI data centers, grid upgrades, and nuclear projects pushing its total backlog towards $200b. The company has agreed to acquire the remaining stake in Prolec GE, aiming to consolidate its position in North American grid equipment. Recent developments come as GE Vernova shares trade around $1,149.19, with returns of 14.6% over the past week and 24.4% over the past month. For investors tracking NYSE:GEV, the...
